name: ITierRouter
description: Contract for model tier routing strategies. Maps logical tier names (e.g. 'fast', 'balanced', 'powerful') to concrete model identifiers. The default implementation performs a static dict lookup; future implementations can use bandit-based adaptive routing.

methods.name: route
methods.description: Resolve a tier name to a concrete model identifier. prompt_complexity is optional and ignored by static implementations; reserved for future bandit-based routers.

behavioral_expectations: Must implement structural subtyping (Protocol) — no explicit inheritance required
route() must return a concrete model identifier string (e.g. 'gpt-4o-mini')
route() must raise PrimitiveError with code BEDDEL-PRIM-320 when the tier name is not recognised
When prompt_complexity is null/None, the router must still return a valid model identifier
